rootCause: app.js loaded brand-runtime.js after the static KPMG identity was already present, causing a second employer lockup on the decision lab and potential duplicate document/report branding.
repairs: Removed brand-runtime.js and the dynamic branding loader.
Established one candidate navigation identity and one static KPMG employer lockup per route.
Normalized all six route menus, active states, keyboard Escape behavior, outside-click close, and mobile composition.
Rebuilt resume and cover-letter identity/contact headers.
Regenerated all four PDFs from the repaired main-equivalent source.
Hardened interview-brief and entry-plan print density for consistent two-page output on GitHub's WeasyPrint runner.

pdfAudit.renderer: GitHub Actions Ubuntu runner with WeasyPrint and Poppler
